About Harsha

Harsha is easygoing by nature and genuinely enjoys being around people. He spends his free time playing volleyball, travelling whenever he gets the chance, and unwinding over a good board game with friends and family. He is curious about new places and cultures, and finds it easy to strike up a conversation wherever he goes. At work he is a software engineer who takes his craft seriously. Simple to get along with, and someone who shows up for the people in his life.
